ability.block_ward_pulse.name: Ward Pulse
ability.block_ward_pulse.description: While [key.mechanic.block](Blocking), you may activate this ability to spend your remaining [key.stat.concentration] to deal [key.variable.positive]({0:N1}) [key.mechanic.posture_damage] and apply [key.variable.positive]({1:N0}) [key.stat.attack.knockback] to all enemies in front of you.
